structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Parallel Fan Control for Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode and Occupied Mode, if ventilation is per California Title 24, the parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow setpoint equals Zone-Abs-OA-min minus current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling AND Occupied Mode AND ventilation per California Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Zone-Abs-OA-min - 0.5*Pfan-z; shut off when primary airflow > Zone-Abs-OA-min. Set fan airflow setpoint = Zone-Abs-OA-min - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode and Occupied Mode, if ventilation is per California Title 24, the parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow setpoint equals Zone-Abs-OA-min minus active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband AND Occupied Mode AND ventilation per California Title 24

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Fan Airflow Reset (50-100% Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 50% to 100% heating loop output, reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating AND Heating Loop output between 50% and 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset parallel fan airflow setpoint from deadband airflow setpoint (Pfan-z if deadband setpoint < Pfan-z) proportionally up to Pfan-htgmax.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).
